commit_scope: Add an interactive recipe-card composer to the public Transmission Recipes surface.

commands: curl -sS --max-time 5 https://pulse.coherencycoin.com/pulse/now | jq '{overall, silences: (.ongoing_silences | length), silent_organs: [.organs[] | select(.status != "breathing") | .name]}'
Browser check: http://localhost:3112/vision/recipes desktop 1280x720, fill starter, edit source, copy card
Browser check: http://localhost:3112/vision/recipes mobile 390x844, composer visible and no main-content overflow
local_validation.summary: Added an interactive recipe-card composer to /vision/recipes with nine atlas fields, three starter cards, completion progress, clear, and copy. Index check, evidence validation, diff check, production build, desktop/mobile browser interaction checks, and local worktree web/API validation passed. Wellness and pulse were breathing before implementation, with pre-existing source-map and symbol drift unrelated to this page.

phase_gate.reason: Local validation passed; CI and public route validation remain pending until PR flow completes.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Visitors can use /vision/recipes to compose a recipe card, load starter cards, see completion progress, clear the card, and copy the card as plain text.
test_flows: Desktop browser check fills a starter card and copies the generated text.
Mobile browser check confirms the composer stacks correctly without main-content overflow.
Production build confirms the route compiles.
